data.body:
Pushed for review: Gerrit change 529 — https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/529
(commit 57dde4b, on top of origin/main 2d1524ad8).

Full `make test` on the repo .venv: 5321 passed, 14 skipped, 100 deselected, and
exactly 1 FAILED — tests/unit/test_resolve_symbol_tool.py::
test_resolve_symbol_confirms_third_party_module. That failure is PRE-EXISTING and
environmental, NOT from this change: it fails identically with my diff stashed on
pristine origin/main. Cause: this machine's `.venv` lives INSIDE the repo tree
(origin=/Users/.../rebar/.venv/.../yaml/__init__.py) on Python 3.14, so the symbol
resolver classifies `yaml` as "repo-local" instead of "third-party/stdlib". CI runs
3.12 with the venv outside the working dir, so it resolves correctly there. It does
not touch resolve_symbol and is unrelated to failure.py/optionality.

Close gate: NOT closing until Gerrit Verified=+1 lands on this patchset (CI green on
the exact tree), per project policy.
